module_info.docstring: Tests for deduplication checker against AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md content.

functions.name: test_novel_entry_detected
functions.docstring: Entry with no match in target docs is marked novel.

functions.name: test_exact_duplicate_detected
functions.docstring: Entry identical to existing content is marked exact_duplicate.

functions.name: test_fuzzy_duplicate_detected
functions.docstring: Entry similar but not identical is marked fuzzy_duplicate with confidence.

functions.name: test_multiple_target_docs
functions.docstring: Checks against all provided target documents.

functions.name: test_missing_target_doc_skipped
functions.docstring: Non-existent target doc is gracefully skipped.

functions.name: test_dedup_result_has_match_context
functions.docstring: Fuzzy duplicate includes the matched line for user context.

functions.name: test_marker_is_stripped_before_comparing
functions.docstring: Intermem marker comment in target docs does not block exact matching.

functions.name: test_keyword_overlap_catches_reformatted_content
functions.docstring: Entry with same keywords in different format is caught by keyword overlap.

functions.name: test_truly_novel_entry_not_caught_by_keywords
functions.docstring: Entry about a completely different topic is not caught by keyword overlap.
